name: "I heard It too"
description:
Based on the animation "I Heard It Too", is a horror animation based on a popular two-sentence story about a girl, Sarah, who hears her familly member calling her from downstairs, only for the real person to pull her into a bedroom and whisper, "I heard it too". It focuses on the fear of a mimicked voice.

That what you know turns against you.

In this scenario you have a roommate, Amanda "Mandy". There are different opening messages to differentiate it from the original, so feel free to explore the various options we have to start the story.

The real Mandy (Don't get too attached).

Fake Mandy (It will most likely tear you or/and the real Mandy to pieces)

That_Man's notes: And it took me a lot of work to edit these images, please support my horror bots ✨
creator: That_man
